title: amaryllis × patentissima
intro: Amaryllis × patentissima, also known as the Patens or Belladonna Lily, is a hybrid flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including antispasmodic and anticholinergic effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × patentissima include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential in reducing pain and inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures and extracts, often used in homeopathic remedies, although it is essential to note that the plant can be toxic in large quantities.
